# Clarev
> Healthcare SaaS platform with EHR, billing, scheduling, and HIPAA-compliant patient management. Built for clinics, private practices, and healthcare providers.

## What We Offer
Healthcare SaaS platform with EHR, billing, scheduling, and HIPAA-compliant patient management. Built for clinics, private practices, and healthcare providers.
